game_name: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles IV: Turtles in Time

special_mechanics.name: Power Attack
special_mechanics.description: Execute by hitting an enemy several times in a row

special_mechanics.name: Slam Attack
special_mechanics.description: Ability to slam foot soldiers into surrounding enemies

special_mechanics.name: Run
special_mechanics.description: Certain joystick/button combinations can make a Turtle run

special_mechanics.name: Air Attack
special_mechanics.description: Perform stationary or directed air attack via joystick/button combinations

tier_notes: Tier 2 data: Qualitative gameplay mechanics documented. No quantitative physics values (acceleration, gravity, velocities) are provided in available sources. Game features four playable turtles with individual strength/weakness stats, but specific numerical parameters are not documented. Control scheme uses joystick + attack/jump buttons with modifier combinations for special moves.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - TMNT IV: Turtles in Time article
